outside_opps.reason: Dominant AI GPU supplier; data center demand remains strong
Services growth + AI integration; defensive tech floor
Architecture royalties from AI chip boom; mobile + data center
On announcement: LONG target at market. Size based on spread width. Monitor antitrust news daily. Exit at deal close OR immediately on deal-break rumor. Max 3% of portfolio.
SHORT target 14 days before lockup expiry. Cover on/after expiry day. Do NOT short if stock is already down 30%+ from IPO price. Avoid if earnings catalyst is nearby.

LONG on large announcement (>3% float). Add on any pullback in 30 days. Confirm FCF can fund it — avoid debt-funded buybacks in high-rate environments.
3 months before: LONG publisher + NVDA. 1 month before: add platform holder (MSFT/SNE). Exit on launch weekend — sell the news.

Use straddle options 30 days before (buy both calls and puts). The binary move exceeds IV pricing 60% of the time. Size max 2% portfolio. Exit day-of or next morning.
